channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Hazard line across road, 11th April
item.description:
This has been in the road for months and will cause damage to cars and also affect those on bikes making it dangerous. Please can this be sorted asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop Line Faded, 11th April
item.description:
Stop line on C phase is faded
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finchley Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stripped bike frame, 11th April
item.description:
Present for at least 6 months. I contacted the owners of the building and they say it is not on their property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Isledon Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs supporting, 11th April
item.description:
I am a Tree Fried and have replaced broken straps on several trees in St. Georges Roadbut but am unable to do so for the one in question as the posts are loose in the ground - they need to be re-installed securely.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St George's Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car - no mot, 11th April
item.description:
Car has been left with flat tyres and no MOT.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brangbourne Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unknown advertising on the pavement, chained to railings, 11th April
item.description:
Advertising on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downland Close, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley and bin bags obstructing parking space, 11th April
item.description:
Neighbours have struggled to park their cars due to an abandoned trolley and bin bags. It's also very dangerous to park at night, as it is hard to spot. Very hazardous when windy as it can hit cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Andrews Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple cracked and uneven paving slabs on the public footpath., 11th April
item.description:
Several paving slabs on the public footpath are cracked, uneven and lifting, creating multiple raised edges and depressions. The surface is no longer level and poses a significant trip hazard to anyone using the pavement, particularly older or less mobile pedestrians. An elderly person recently tripped at this exact location, which highlights the immediate risk. The area requires prompt inspection and repair to prevent further accidents and ensure the footpath is safe for public use. The exact location is outside of 1 and 3 Laurel Way, N20 8HR.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Laurel Way, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped on pavement (witnessed action), 11th April
item.description:
The offenders originally dumped the sofa in the alleyway leading to the River Thames. A few days later it appeared on the pavement. Please remove as it is obstructing pedestrians and parking especially at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Andrews Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wall damaged, 11th April
item.description:
Failure to fix this has led to further deterioration of this wall. This is a health and safety issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 11th April
item.description:
Litter all around bus stop Y at Deptford bridge next to Co Op. In flower bed and bush behind bus stop. This area is NOT cleaned weekly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags left on top of litter bin, 11th April
item.description:
Someone in the neighborhood left rubbish bags on top of the existing litter bins. This is a recurring issues, and every time the morning after the street is covered in rubbish as a result of foxes activity. I understand there is a CCTV camera in that exact spot. Maybe that can be used to identify the responsible, who seems to follow a pattern of habit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104a-f, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three rolls royces are still parked here. They take up several parking spaces which could be used by visitors using the shops., 11th April
item.description:
They have not been moved at all for several months and appear to be suing the spaces as free storage.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Dulwich Village, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken water meter cover — open chamber, trip hazard, 11th April
item.description:
That water meter cover had been cracked for a long time until yesterday when it got completely destroyed and is now a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbrooke Crescent, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole part of road needs fixing, 11th April
item.description:
It’s been like it for weeks and getting bigger and deeper
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Lingfield Crescent, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Some rubble left on the dropped kerb, 11th April
item.description:
There is some sort of concrete rubble left on the dropped kerb of the pavement along Onega Gate, by the turning into Plover Way. Please could this be cleared away. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Onega Gate, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of household debris, 11th April
item.description:
This area is frequently used for fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins & fly-tipping, 11th April
item.description:
Recycling bins used as a dumping site

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mabley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
Fly tipping near public recreational areas and risk to public and for a long time and getting worst since a months. Along watery lane leading to Queen Mary’s hospital right side field and opposite horse field.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frognal Place, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping Trolley left in road, 11th April
item.description:
Shopping trolley left in street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marina Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
